y_star: P1 Board 2026-04-21 directive Gemma speed tuning per WebSearch research. CEO research findings in reports/ceo/strategic/gemma_speed_optimization_research_20260421.md (pending). Actionable tuning: 1 set OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL=4 or higher in daemon env (per-agent worker concurrent inference, 10x throughput for 10-agent cluster) 2 OLLAMA_KEEP_ALIVE=-1 keep model resident (avoid per-30min launchd cycle reload cost) 3 reduce per-agent system prompt WHO_I_AM from 2500 chars to ~500 chars focused on Section 2 M Triangle plus Section 5 Iron Rules only (less context = faster gen) 4 model-per-tier routing: e4b (5s) for NREM dream plus commitment scan plus non-critical bg tasks, ystar-gemma (21s) only for CEO decision plus CTO ruling 5 measure before-after latency p50 plus p95 per tier via empirical timing. NOT to do: flash attention (Gemma 4 hybrid attention 50 sliding plus 10 global has dual-dim bug issue 15368, hang risk) plus manual MLX tweak (auto already optimal). Deliverables: a Ethan ruling Y-star-gov reports cto CZL-GEMMA-TUNING-ruling.md b aiden_cluster_daemon patch add OLLAMA_NUM_PARALLEL plus keep-alive plus tier-model selection c test_aiden_cluster_daemon_tuning.py 3 plus pytest verify tier selection plus prompt length plus env setup d empirical latency benchmark before-after. M-tag M-1 (survival speed) plus M-3 (product story faster response). Owner Ethan implementation per P-12 先查后造 already done via CEO WebSearch. Budget 15 tool uses. No unsafe flags.

y_star: Board night observation: three consecutive reactive patches (venv dirs, per-agent binary state, draft message + bench output) show blacklist cannot catch new tool tmp signatures. Replace with 3-Tier filter. Tier 1 static blacklist keeps fast path unchanged. Tier 2 structural heuristics NEW: (a) batch anomaly detect single directory adding over 50 files warn or block matches venv mass-copy signature, (b) binary magic byte identification for sqlite zip pdf null-byte streams, (c) directory depth patterns auto match python cache dirs node cache dirs virtualenv markers, (d) exclusion drift detection with auto-suggest. Tier 3 learning BEST: (a) pollution learner listens to git reset events and records undone paths into historical registry, (b) next commit queries historical registry and rejects new paths matching learned pattern, (c) emits POLLUTION_LEARNED audit event, (d) brain node pattern pollution receives activation strengthening common modes over time. M-tag M-2a prevents commission M-2b prevents reactive loop. Deliverables 3 tier implementation plus pytest fuzz generating unknown patterns verifying T2 block plus mock historical data verifying T3 reject of unseen prefix plus replay of three prior pollution datasets verifying 100 percent intercept rate. Suggested assignee Ryan Platform for T1 T2 integration plus Leo Kernel for T3 learner and brain fusion. Rejected alternatives exclusion config only (bypass too easy new tools do not write config) and blacklist expansion (reactive forever chasing). Architecture aligned enforce-as-router commit gate is singular mandatory touchpoint better to install real filter than extend keyword lists.

y_star: Board 2026-04-21 night directive: after CZL-K9AUDIT-REVIVE ships, the very first audit task is to sweep the entire repo for speech-governance leakage where rules scan user facing description text or metadata content to make behavior judgments. Known concrete violation today: boundary_enforcer blocking dispatch_board post when --description contains file-name literal strings (happened 3 times tonight during intelligent-filter card posting; description is human explanation text, not action target, yet enforcer denies write as if description were the write_path). Required: K9 causal analyzer walks every enforcement hook + every forget_guard rule + every audit rule, classifies each as behavior-governance (checks actual action/state/command) vs speech-governance (string-scans description/reply/metadata), and produces report with retirement candidates. M-tag M-2a structural correction. Gated on CZL-K9AUDIT-REVIVE completion. Depends-on: K9 daily patrol LIVE. Suggested assignee Maya Governance (causal scope). Deliverables: 1 audit report with per-rule classification + retirement recommendations + 1 pytest regression asserting enforcer no longer false-triggers on string contents of description field.

1. Update governance/sub_agent_boot_prompt_template.md MANDATORY section: receipt 必含 YAML frontmatter (--- block) 头, 含 fields:
   - receipt_schema_version: 1.0
   - tool_uses_claimed: int
   - tool_breakdown: {bash, read, edit, write, grep, glob, agent}
   - m_functor: str (e.g. M-2a)
   - rt_plus_1: int
   - artifacts: list[str]
   - eight_module_activation: dict

   - parse YAML frontmatter via yaml.safe_load (不靠 NL regex)

   - missing frontmatter → CIEU RECEIPT_MISSING_STRUCTURED_HEADER warn (7d baseline)
